headline: Can 13-15% Procedure Growth in 2026 Sustain ISRG's Premium Valuation?
summary: Intuitive Surgical's 13-15% 2026 procedure growth signals durable demand and global expansion, but macro and policy risks could test its premium valuation.

headline: Zimmer Biomet Announces Webcast and Conference Call of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE and SIX: ZBH), a global medical technology leader, today announced its first quarter earnings conference call will be webcast on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. A news release detailing the quarterly results will be made available that day at 6:30 a.m. ET.

headline: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Valuation Check After New Technology Leadership And Robotic Shoulder Surgery Milestones
summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) is back in focus after two technology linked milestones: the appointment of a new chief science and technology leader and a high profile robotic assisted shoulder surgery using its ROSA platform in an outpatient setting. See our latest analysis for Zimmer Biomet Holdings. Despite the recent headlines around robotics and leadership changes, momentum in Zimmer Biomet’s shares has been subdued, with a 1-week share price return of 2.2% and a 1-year total shareholder...
